testimonials.title: What Our Users Say
testimonials.subtitle: Real feedback from pilot users and testers

ravi.name: Ravi Kumar
ravi.text: CareTrace AI reminders made my medication routine completely stress-free. I never miss a dose now.

anitha.name: Anitha Reddy
anitha.text: Tracking my father's medicines is now simple. It reduced our anxiety significantly.

suresh.name: Suresh
suresh.text: The interface is clean and intuitive. Very practical for daily healthcare management.

priya.name: Dr. Priya Sharma
priya.text: Solutions like CareTrace AI can improve medication adherence and patient safety.

landing.feature_1_body: Built for daily use, not paperwork.
landing.feature_2_body: See how your health changes over time, rather than just today.
landing.feature_3_body: Export a clear timeline of your health for your next appointment.
landing.footer_mission: Health happens between appointments. CareTrace helps you track what matters.
landing.feature_tracking_desc: Log symptoms easily with simple inputs and clear scoring.
landing.feature_analysis_desc: Identify patterns in your symptom history to better understand your health.
landing.feature_timeline_desc: See your health patterns over time with clear, interactive charts.
landing.feature_multilingual_desc: Fully supported in English, Hindi, Telugu, Tamil, and Kannada.
landing.hero_copy: Clear insights for your long-term health.
landing.mini_card_1_detail: Built for daily use, not paperwork.
landing.mini_card_2_detail: See how your health changes over time, rather than just today.
landing.mini_card_3_detail: Export a clear timeline for your next appointment.
landing.trust_continuity_detail: Turn single updates into a clear history, making it easier to spot trends over time.
landing.trust_signal_detail: A calm interface that highlights what matters, so you can focus on your health.
landing.trust_privacy_detail: Your health data is sensitive. We use industry-standard encryption to keep it secure.
landing.workflow_title: Capture the signal. Ignore the noise.
landing.workflow_desc: Designed to make tracking simple, so you can focus on understanding your health.
landing.workflow_step1_desc: Log symptoms and notes in seconds.
landing.workflow_step2_desc: Watch your daily check-ins turn into a clear timeline.
landing.workflow_step3_desc: Bring a detailed history to your next doctor's visit.
landing.platform_desc: A secure, simple platform built to give you control over your health data.
landing.feature_timeline_card_title: A clear view of your health.
landing.feature_timeline_card_desc: See your symptoms, reports, and insights in one continuous timeline.
landing.feature_analysis_card_desc: Clear summaries and pattern detection, without the medical jargon.
landing.feature_tracking_card_desc: Easy-to-use inputs ensure your data is always accurate and useful.
landing.feature_access_desc: Designed to be accessible, with full support for multiple languages.
landing.security_desc: We use top-tier encryption and security practices to ensure your health information is safe.
landing.security_pillar1_desc: You decide who sees your health data and when to share it.
landing.security_pillar2_desc: Built with industry-leading security to protect your information.
landing.security_pillar3_desc: Export your data into simple, secure reports for your doctor.
landing.cta_copy: CareTrace helps you track what matters.
landing.footer_tagline: Track your symptoms and take control of your health journey.
